scripts.check:code: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm test
scripts.check:docs: pnpm -s run check:docs:agents && pnpm -s run check:docs:headers && pnpm -s run check:docs:metadata && pnpm -s run check:docs:sync-manifest
scripts.dev: COGNI_REPO_PATH=$(pwd) dotenv -e .env.local -- bash -c 'DOLTGRES_URL=$DOLTGRES_URL_OPERATOR pnpm --filter operator dev'
scripts.dev:infra: docker network create cogni-edge || true && docker compose --env-file .env.local -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d git-sync postgres doltgres litellm redis loki grafana alloy autoheal temporal-postgres temporal temporal-ui scheduler-worker
scripts.dev:infra:test: docker network create cogni-edge || true && DATABASE_SERVICE_URL_DOCKER=postgresql://app_service:service_password@postgres:5432/cogni_template_stack_test docker compose --env-file .env.test -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d git-sync postgres doltgres litellm mock-llm redis loki grafana alloy autoheal temporal-postgres temporal temporal-ui scheduler-worker
scripts.dev:infra:mcp: docker compose --env-file .env.local -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml --profile mcp-playwright up -d playwright-mcp grafana-mcp
scripts.dev:stack:full: pnpm dev:infra && pnpm dev & pnpm dev:resy & wait
scripts.dev:resy: COGNI_REPO_PATH=$(pwd)/nodes/resy NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3300 dotenv -e .env.local -- bash -c 'DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL_RESY DATABASE_SERVICE_URL=$DATABASE_SERVICE_URL_RESY AUTH_SECRET=$AUTH_SECRET_RESY DOLTGRES_URL=$DOLTGRES_URL_RESY pnpm --filter @cogni/resy-app dev'
scripts.dev:stack:test: pnpm dev:infra:test && COGNI_REPO_PATH=$(pwd) dotenv -e .env.test -- pnpm --filter operator dev
scripts.dev:stack:test:full: pnpm dev:infra:test && COGNI_REPO_PATH=$(pwd) dotenv -e .env.test -- pnpm --filter operator dev & pnpm dev:resy:test & wait
scripts.dev:resy:test: COGNI_REPO_PATH=$(pwd)/nodes/resy NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3300 dotenv -e .env.test -- bash -c 'DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL_RESY DATABASE_SERVICE_URL=$DATABASE_SERVICE_URL_RESY AUTH_SECRET=$AUTH_SECRET_RESY DOLTGRES_URL=$DOLTGRES_URL_RESY pnpm --filter @cogni/resy-app dev'
scripts.db:check: pnpm db:check:operator && pnpm db:check:resy && pnpm db:check:operator:doltgres && pnpm db:check:journal-when && pnpm db:check:immutable
scripts.db:provision: docker compose --env-file .env.local -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml --profile bootstrap run --rm db-provision && pnpm db:provision:doltgres
scripts.doltgres:nuke: docker stop doltgres 2>/dev/null; docker rm doltgres 2>/dev/null; docker volume rm doltgres_data 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Doltgres nuked (container + volume)'
scripts.db:provision:test: docker compose --env-file .env.test -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml --profile bootstrap run --rm db-provision && docker compose --env-file .env.test -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml --profile bootstrap run --rm doltgres-provision
scripts.db:setup:nodes: pnpm db:provision:nodes && pnpm db:migrate:nodes && pnpm db:seed && pnpm db:seed-money:nodes && pnpm db:seed:doltgres:nodes
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:provision && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && pnpm db:seed:doltgres
scripts.dev:setup: pnpm db:setup && pnpm db:setup:test && pnpm governance:schedules:sync
scripts.docker:stack:full: echo 'TODO(task.0247): add node services to docker-compose' && pnpm docker:dev:stack
scripts.docker:stack:full:fast: echo 'TODO(task.0247): add node services to docker-compose' && pnpm docker:dev:stack:fast
scripts.docker:dev:stack: docker network create cogni-edge || true && DB_PORT=5432 docker compose --env-file .env.local --env-file .env.docker -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:dev:stack:fast: docker network create cogni-edge || true && DB_PORT=5432 docker compose --env-file .env.local --env-file .env.docker -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d
scripts.docker:test:stack: docker network create cogni-edge || true && DB_PORT=5432 DATABASE_SERVICE_URL_DOCKER=postgresql://app_service:service_password@postgres:5432/cogni_template_stack_test docker compose --env-file .env.test -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:test:stack:fast: docker network create cogni-edge || true && DB_PORT=5432 DATABASE_SERVICE_URL_DOCKER=postgresql://app_service:service_password@postgres:5432/cogni_template_stack_test docker compose --env-file .env.test -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d
scripts.docker:test:stack:reset: pnpm docker:test:stack:down && pnpm db:drop:test || true && pnpm docker:test:stack:setup
scripts.docker:edge:up: docker network create cogni-edge || true && dotenv -e .env.local -- docker compose -f infra/compose/edge/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.docker:stack: docker network create cogni-edge || true && DB_PORT=5432 docker compose --env-file .env.local -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:stack:fast: docker network create cogni-edge || true && DB_PORT=5432 docker compose --env-file .env.local -f infra/compose/runtime/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d
scripts.posthog:up: docker network create internal || true && docker compose -f infra/compose/posthog/docker-compose.posthog.yml up -d
scripts.packages:build: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/**" --filter "./nodes/*/packages/**" --filter "./nodes/*/graphs/**" build && tsc -b packages/*/tsconfig.json packages/langgraph-graphs/tsconfig.build.json nodes/*/packages/*/tsconfig.json && pnpm packages:validate
scripts.packages:build:clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo nodes/*/packages/*/dist nodes/*/packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo nodes/*/graphs/dist && pnpm packages:build
scripts.lint: biome check . && eslint nodes/operator/app/src/app nodes/operator/app/src/components nodes/operator/app/src/features nodes/operator/app/src/styles --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings=0 --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.lint:fix: biome check . --write && eslint nodes/operator/app/src/app nodes/operator/app/src/components nodes/operator/app/src/features nodes/operator/app/src/styles --fix --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings=0 --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.test:component: for cfg in nodes/*/app/vitest.component.config.mts; do echo "Running component tests: $cfg" && vitest run --config "$cfg" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:external: for cfg in nodes/*/app/vitest.external.config.mts packages/*/vitest.external.config.ts; do [ -f "$cfg" ] || continue; echo "External: $cfg" && vitest run --config "$cfg" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:external:money: for cfg in nodes/*/app/vitest.external-money.config.mts; do echo "External money: $cfg" && vitest run --config "$cfg" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:services:local: if ls services/*/tests >/dev/null 2>&1; then vitest run services/*/tests; else echo 'No service tests found (skipped)'; fi
scripts.test:stack:docker: DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=55432 TEST_BASE_URL=https://localhost/ dotenv -e .env.test -- vitest run --config nodes/${STACK_NODE:-operator}/app/vitest.stack.config.mts
scripts.governance:schedules:sync: pnpm dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -lc 'curl -fsS -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/internal/ops/governance/schedules/sync -H "Authorization: Bearer ${INTERNAL_OPS_TOKEN:?INTERNAL_OPS_TOKEN is required}"'
